master_research_prompt:
Research comprehensive data on Sarjapur Road, Bangalore real estate market for 2026. This research will inform a complete content cluster covering location analysis, property prices, rentals, infrastructure, lifestyle amenities, and educational facilities. Provide authoritative, current data with specific citations.

**GEOGRAPHIC AND LOCATION ANALYSIS:**
Provide detailed geographic boundaries of Sarjapur Road stretch in Bangalore, including exact start and end points, major intersections, and sub-localities. List all pincodes covering Sarjapur Road area. Calculate precise distances from Sarjapur Road to major Bangalore landmarks: Electronic City, Whitefield, Koramangala, HSR Layout, BTM Layout, Silk Board Junction, Marathahalli, Bellandur, and Bangalore city centre. Include travel times by private vehicle and public transport during peak and off-peak hours. Identify which BBMP ward(s) Sarjapur Road falls under and provide administrative jurisdiction details.

**CURRENT PROPERTY MARKET ANALYSIS (2026):**
Provide current property prices per square foot for residential properties on Sarjapur Road as of Q1 2026, segmented by: ready-to-move flats, under-construction projects, premium segment (above ₹8000/sqft), mid-segment (₹4000-8000/sqft), and budget segment (below ₹4000/sqft). List exact price ranges for 1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK, and 4BHK flats with carpet area specifications. Include price variations by specific micro-locations along Sarjapur Road (e.g., near Wipro Corporate Office, near Carmelaram, near Dommasandra Circle). Provide year-on-year price appreciation data for 2024-2026 period with percentage changes. Compare Sarjapur Road prices with neighbouring areas: HSR Layout, Koramangala, Electronic City, and Whitefield.

**RENTAL MARKET DATA:**
Provide current rental rates for 2026 across different property types: 1BHK (₹X-Y), 2BHK (₹X-Y), 3BHK (₹X-Y), 4BHK+ (₹X-Y) with specific ranges. Include rental yields for investors, security deposit norms (typically X months), and maintenance charges. Identify premium residential complexes with highest rental rates and budget-friendly options. List factors affecting rental pricing: proximity to IT companies, metro connectivity, amenities, and furnishing status.

**NEW PROJECTS AND INVENTORY:**
List all residential projects launched in 2025-2026 on Sarjapur Road with builder names, project names, unit configurations, pricing, possession timelines, and RERA registration numbers. Include upcoming launches planned for 2026-2027. Provide inventory status: ready-to-move vs under-construction ratio. List major builders active in Sarjapur Road: Prestige Group, Brigade Group, Sobha Limited, Godrej Properties, etc., with their current and upcoming projects.

**INFRASTRUCTURE AND CONNECTIVITY:**
Provide current status of Sarjapur Road metro connectivity including nearest existing metro stations with exact distances. Detail planned metro extensions: Phase 2B of Bangalore Metro covering Sarjapur Road with timeline, stations planned, and expected completion dates. Analyze current road infrastructure: road width, condition, ongoing widening projects, and traffic congestion patterns during peak hours (7-10 AM, 6-9 PM). List major bus routes serving Sarjapur Road with BMTC route numbers. Include connectivity to Kempegowda International Airport with travel time and transport options.

**IT HUB AND EMPLOYMENT PROXIMITY:**
List major IT companies and offices located on or near Sarjapur Road: Wipro Corporate Office, Infosys campuses, TCS facilities, and other tech parks. Calculate distances to major IT hubs: Electronic City (X km), Whitefield (Y km), Outer Ring Road IT corridor. Provide employment statistics and workforce residing in Sarjapur Road area.

**SOCIAL INFRASTRUCTURE:**
List top-rated schools within 5km radius of Sarjapur Road including: CBSE schools, international schools (IB, IGCSE, Cambridge), state board schools. Provide school fee ranges, admission processes, and academic ratings. Include healthcare facilities: multi-specialty hospitals, clinics, diagnostic centres with names and specialties. List shopping destinations: malls, retail outlets, supermarkets, and local markets.

**LIFESTYLE AND AMENITIES:**
Provide comprehensive list of restaurants on Sarjapur Road categorized by: fine dining (₹1500+ per person), casual dining (₹500-1500), quick service restaurants, street food options. Include popular cafes, co-working spaces, pubs, bars, and breweries with names, locations, and specialties. List entertainment options: multiplexes, gaming zones, sports facilities, parks, and recreational centres.

**REGULATORY AND LEGAL ASPECTS:**
Provide RERA compliance status for major projects, approved building plans, BBMP approvals, and any legal disputes or issues affecting properties. Include property registration costs, stamp duty rates for Karnataka, and documentation requirements.

**INVESTMENT ANALYSIS:**
Provide rental yields, capital appreciation trends, and investment attractiveness scores. Compare investment potential with other Bangalore micro-markets. Include analysis of factors driving demand: IT proximity, infrastructure development, and demographic trends.

**FUTURE DEVELOPMENT PLANS:**
Detail upcoming infrastructure projects: metro extensions, road improvements, flyovers, and government initiatives affecting Sarjapur Road. Include timeline for major developments and their expected impact on property values.

**DEMOGRAPHIC AND LIFESTYLE DATA:**
Provide resident demographics: age groups, income levels, family types, and lifestyle preferences. Include data on IT professionals, families with children, and senior citizens residing in the area.

**SPECIFIC FAQ RESEARCH:**
Address these specific questions with factual data: exact pincode coverage, best areas for families vs bachelors, traffic conditions during different times, metro timeline with official announcements, school admission seasons and processes, restaurant recommendations by cuisine type, property price predictions for 2026-2027, rental agreement norms, and maintenance costs in residential complexes.

**SOURCE REQUIREMENTS:**
Cite all data from authoritative sources only: RERA Karnataka, BBMP, BDA, Knight Frank India, JLL India, ANAROCK, CBRE, Cushman & Wakefield, government transport authorities, school websites, and established real estate platforms. Provide source URLs in markdown format [Source Name](URL). Prioritize data from last 18 months unless historical context is required. Use British Indian English terminology: 'flat' not 'apartment', 'lakh/crore' for currency, 'BBMP' for municipal corporation, 'RERA' for regulatory authority.

**DATA FRESHNESS:**
All pricing data must be from Q4 2025 or Q1 2026. Infrastructure updates from last 12 months. School and amenity information current as of 2026. Historical data acceptable only for trend analysis and comparative studies.

Provide specific numbers, exact addresses, precise distances, current prices with ranges, named entities, and verifiable facts that can support detailed content creation across the entire Sarjapur Road real estate content cluster.
